results.Name: פיסיקה 1
results.StudyContentDescription: Newtonian mechanics: internal and external forces, conservation of energy, linear momentum, angular momentum, equations of motion, Galilean transformation, accelerated systems. Special theory of relativity: velocity of light and its measurement, relativity principle, Lorentz transformation, proper time, relativistic Doppler effect, relativistic energy and momentum, collisions, creation and decay of particles.
